items.definition_en: Waste is unwanted material or things that are thrown away.
items.example_en: We put our waste in the bin.

items.definition_en: A bin is a container for holding waste or trash.
items.example_en: He threw the paper in the bin.

items.definition_en: A worker is someone who does a job for a business.
items.example_en: A worker collects garbage every morning.

items.definition_en: A truck is a large vehicle used for carrying things.
items.example_en: The waste is taken away by a truck.

items.definition_en: A factory is a building where large amounts of things are made.
items.example_en: The factory sorts the waste into different types.

items.definition_en: A collection is when things are gathered together.
Recycling is the process of turning waste into something new.
items.example_en: People should take part in recycling.

items.definition_en: A customer is a person who buys goods or services from a business.
items.example_en: Each customer needs a bin for waste.

items.definition_en: A service is work done for someone else, usually for money.
items.example_en: The waste service comes once a week.

items.definition_en: A container is an object used for holding things.
items.example_en: We put bottles in the container for glass.

items.definition_en: A manager is a person who is in charge of workers or business activities.
items.example_en: The manager checks if the waste is sorted correctly.

items.definition_en: A recycling center is a place where waste is taken to be recycled.
items.example_en: Our old computers went to the recycling center.

items.definition_en: Plastic is a light, man–made material often used for packaging.
items.example_en: The waste company collects plastic every Friday.

items.definition_en: Paper is a thin material used for writing and wrapping things.
items.example_en: He put the used paper into the recycling bin.

items.definition_en: Glass is a hard, clear material used for bottles and windows.
items.example_en: Glass waste goes into a special container.

items.definition_en: An employee is a person who works for a business.
items.example_en: Every employee must know how to sort waste.

items.definition_en: Garbage is waste material that people throw away.
items.example_en: The garbage was taken out in the morning.
